location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 9+ years of industry experience with a BS/Masters OR 6+ years with a PhD
Compensation range $200K-$240K base, consistent with Staff IC at Airbnb
Described as 'one of the most consequential roles in CS Platform Product'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 9+ years of industry experience with a BS/Masters OR 6+ years with a PhD, with deep expertise in AI/ML-powered platforms at consumer scale

Strong working knowledge of personalization systems, contextual data retrieval, and LLM architectures - you can engage credibly with ML engineers on topics like RAG, retrieval optimization, and context engineering tradeoffs
Track record of building and shipping foundational platform products that power multiple downstream experiences and surfaces
Experience designing and interpreting A/B experiments and online experiment frameworks; ability to own end-to-end metrics strategy for complex AI systems
Strong capacity to synthesize ambiguous signals into clear, prioritized product decisions
Proven cross-functional leadership: able to align ML, engineering, data science, design, and operations teams around a shared vision
Experience shipping consumer-facing AI products with personalization at the core
Sharp product intuition for when AI automation should give way to human judgment, and how to design systems that make that transition seamless
Ability to work at multiple levels of abstraction - from the architecture of a retrieval system to the experience of a guest trying to resolve a cancellation dispute

scope.surface: AI Personalization platform across Airbnb's customer support ecosystem (AIA — AI agent for guest/host support)
scope.business_model: consumer marketplace (B2C), guest and host support platform
primary_metrics_inferred: AI vs. human agent performance gap
core_responsibilities: Contribute towards the long-term vision for building 10-star, personalized community support
Partner with data science, ML, and operations to identify new high-signal personalization signals
Own the product roadmap across ML models, signals, schemas, and prompt optimization
Drive personalization experiment design and measurement: define KPIs (self-solve rate, personalization coverage, citation accuracy)
Collaborate with ML engineers to shape requirements for accuracy, latency, and scalability improvements
Scale personalization infrastructure across Airbnb's AI surfaces
Build a framework for continuous improvement to close the gap between AI and human agent performance
Collaborate across engineering, ML, design, data science, and policy to ship with rigor from concept to production

compensation.equity_form: bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($200K-$240K base)
Clear product surface ownership: full-stack AI personalization for CS platform
Specific KPIs named (self-solve rate, personalization coverage, citation accuracy)
Encouraging inclusion statement — all qualified individuals encouraged to apply
red_flags: Remote-US eligible but requires living in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity — some states are excluded; list is 'continuously evolving'
Visa sponsorship not addressed in JD; work_auth inferred as no-sponsorship based on state-residency restriction language
High buzzword density may indicate vague or aspirational role definition
No explicit team size or org structure provided
Requirement for 9+ years (BS/MS) is a high bar; 6+ with PhD alternative may narrow pool further
